name: ai-conversation-assistant
description: AI-powered real-time conversation assistant similar to Cluely.ai

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:desktop
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../desktop && npm install

author: AI Assistant Developer
